title: Onarway Garden Hose Spray Gun Set 8 Patterns High Pressure Nozzles, Anti-Slip Design, Perfect for Watering Plants Car Washing Shower Pet, 5PCS Garden Showers Set
features: 【Package Include】1x 8 Pattern Nozzle, 1x 1/2" hose adapter; 1x water-stop connector; 1x 1/2"&3/4" 2 in 1 faucet adapter, 1x repair connector, 4x seal rings, you don't need to buy extra accessories. It is used for European standard 1/2" 12.5mm hosepipe (OD15~18mm).

【8 Adjustable Spray Patterns Nozzle】The Water spray gun has 8 kinds of watering setting which can be easily adjusted by the Spin-click spray selector(Center, Mist, Shower, Rinse, Flat, Soaker, Cone, and Spurt), to meet all your watering needs. From high pressure to the soft level which is ideal for watering plants or lawn, washing pets, cleaning windows, and other outdoor cleaning.

【Save Water & Labor saving】The water flow control knob allows you to adjust the water pressure to suit your needs, saving a lot of water. The garden hose nozzle is provided with a fixed wrench on the top of the handle, which continuously sprays water without pressure by hand.

【Soft Non-slip texture】Non-slip texture design that fits the human hand structure, comfortable grip and easier to use. Compared with metal material spray gun, plastic material does not rust, which can last longer life.
【Tips】: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
